description: Deduplicate load_urls helper across build scripts
task: Refactor: Extract the duplicated load_urls function from 45+ build scripts into a shared utility. Create wikigr/packs/utils.py with a load_urls function that reads urls.txt with blank/comment filtering. Then update all build scripts to import from the shared module. Run tests after.

description: Fix pyproject.toml missing dependency and cleanup
task: Cleanup: Fix issue 247 about missing deps in pyproject.toml. Also fix issue 246 about hardcoded session paths in run.sh files. Check if there are any stale workstream files like round1-workstreams.json, round2-workstreams.json etc in the repo root and remove them. Clean up any launcher.py or run.sh files that should not be in the repo.

description: Create build scripts and URL lists for 4 missing packs
task:
Create build scripts and URL lists for the 4 packs that are missing pack.db: azure-lighthouse, fabric-graphql-expert, security-copilot, sentinel-graph.

For each:
1. Research the domain and create data/packs/PACK/urls.txt with 50-80 URLs from official docs
2. Create scripts/build_PACK_pack.py following the pattern of existing build scripts like build_go_pack.py
3. Build the pack by running the script

azure-lighthouse: Azure Lighthouse docs from learn.microsoft.com
fabric-graphql-expert: already has urls.txt, just needs a build script
security-copilot: Microsoft Security Copilot docs from learn.microsoft.com
sentinel-graph: Microsoft Sentinel docs from learn.microsoft.com
